title: SMP Items
description: This project adds: A god-like crown, 2 custom totems and one mythic golden carrot. Great of SMPs
body:
# DESCRIPTION

**This plugin adds 4 custom items: 
- Dragon / King Crown
- Two custom totems
- Custom Golden Carrot**

## The Crown (Unique Artifact)
Crafting recipe:

N N N N D N N N N

N = Netherite Ingot
D = Dragon Egg

This item can only be crafted ONCE on the entire server.

**Crown Stats -> Item type: Golden Helmet**
Enchantments:
Protection X
Respiration V
Aqua Affinity
Curse of Binding

**Special properties:**
Unbreakable
Cannot be further enchanted
Cannot be modified in anvils

**Passive Effects (while worn)**
While wearing the Crown:
Max Health becomes 40 HP (20 hearts)
Night Vision
Resistance I
Fire Resistance I
This makes the wearer extremely durable and powerful.

**Crown Ability – Royal Heal**
Press: Shift + F

(default Minecraft swap-hands key)

Effect
Instantly heals you to full health

Cooldown: 120 seconds

The cooldown is player-based and persists even if you relog.

## The Infamous Carrot
A powerful infinite food item.

D D D
C C C
D D D

D = Diamond Block
C = Golden Carrot

Ability -> When eaten:
The carrot is NOT consumed
Gives normal golden carrot saturation
Grants Regeneration I for 2 seconds

Cooldown: 5 seconds

This makes it extremely strong for sustained PvP and survival.

## Totem (Revealer Totem)
Found in Ancient City chests -> 10% chance

Ability
When the totem is held in main hand or offhand, it reveals nearby players.

Effect
All players within 150 blocks receive Glowing
Makes them visible through walls
Perfect for hunting hidden players or detecting ambushes

Notes
Works continuously while held
Works in either hand 

## Totem (Escape Totem)
Found in Ancient City chests -> 10% chance

Ability
When the totem is placed in your offhand, you become extremely difficult to track.

Effect
Grants Invisibility
Your armor becomes visually hidden
Your held items become visually hidden

To other players, you appear as a completely invisible player with no gear, making it perfect for:
escaping fights
stealth attacks
infiltration
Important

Must stay in offhand
Removing it instantly removes the effect
